description: Argo guardrails — plugin-side SAFETY hooks (destructive-git, pipe-to-shell, shell-source-write, lockfile, designer-spawn, session context) run verbatim from this directory; every kit GATE (red-proof, trust, design-commit, design-coverage, format-on-write, test-smell, design-guard) is dispatched through the @argohq/kit CLI's argo-hook subcommand, fail-closed when the kit is not installed.

hooks.command: npx --no @argohq/kit argo-hook bash-pretooluse || { echo 'argo gates inactive: run bun install (or /argo:init)' >&2; exit 2; }
npx --no @argohq/kit argo-hook post-edit-write || { echo 'argo gates inactive: run bun install (or /argo:init)' >&2; exit 2; }
npx --no @argohq/kit argo-hook design-guard-record || { echo 'argo gates inactive: run bun install (or /argo:init)' >&2; exit 2; }
npx --no @argohq/kit argo-hook design-guard-stop || { echo 'argo gates inactive: run bun install (or /argo:init)' >&2; exit 2; }
npx --no @argohq/kit argo-hook design-guard-stop || { echo 'argo gates inactive: run bun install (or /argo:init)' >&2; exit 2; }
